summary: Show saved-owned type candidates even when their selected-type score is zero, so saved-data mode does not hide most owned targets.
bugClassification: Saved-data candidate filtering false negative caused by score-threshold ordering
rootCause: The type candidate list always required matchedCount > 0 before rendering. In saved-data mode the candidate population is already restricted to owned saved data, so owned generals/equipment with zero score for the selected type disappeared completely instead of appearing with 0/10 at the bottom of the list.
externalizationDecision: No HTML changes; the behavior is fixed in existing external JavaScript and guarded by a validation tool.
minimumUserAcceptance: Open saved-data mode, select the same vaccine type, open type candidates, and confirm saved-owned generals/equipment remain listed with low/zero scores instead of disappearing.
